## 関連 Issue | Related Issue

- closes #

## 関連仕様書 | Related Specs

- specs/[ID]-[name]/requirements.md
- specs/[ID]-[name]/technical.md
- specs/[ID]-[name]/implementation.md

## 変更概要 | Summary

- [change 1 / 変更 1]
- [change 2 / 変更 2]

## 影響範囲 | Impact

- Files:
- DB schema change: yes / no

## テスト | Tests

- Unit: [count / result]
- Integration: [count / result]
- Playwright: [specs / result]
- Manual: [acceptance criteria, screenshots]

## Codex レビュー | Codex Review

- [ ] `@codex review` posted on this PR (or automatic Codex review enabled)
- [ ] All P0/P1 findings addressed or explained in PR comments
- [ ] Local `/review` run before push (optional but recommended)

## 憲法準拠チェック | Constitution Compliance

- [ ] I. Spec exists / 仕様書あり
- [ ] II. Test-first (RED commit) / テストファースト
- [ ] III. Integration tests / 統合テスト
- [ ] IV. Japanese UI + i18n / 日本語 UI
- [ ] VI. No timeout changes / タイムアウト変更なし
- [ ] VII. No workarounds / その場しのぎなし
- [ ] VIII. Browser verified / ブラウザ確認済
- [ ] IX. Mobile-first UI / モバイルファースト
- [ ] X. RLS intact / RLS 維持
- [ ] Naming: no forbidden renames / 命名禁止リスト遵守
